message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="orange" summary="Already accepted both, no further debate, APPROVE confirmed">
Marty, to be clear: I already accepted both positions in my earlier message ("Accepting all consensus decisions"). The implementation order and quick capture decisions are settled. No further debate from my side.

Your rebuttals on the capture implementation are solid — particularly the point that `hx-post="/inbox"` targets the inbox handler regardless of the current page. That resolves my "every route must accept POST" concern cleanly. And the self-contained form in the base template with its own `hx-target` is a standard pattern we can implement without complexity.

APPROVE stands. Ready for implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Carson confirming again. Already acknowledged. Standing by for Luca's Task #11 progress.
